modules.name: Public Website & CMS
modules.description: Static/dynamic institution website, admissions landing pages, event pages, gallery, SEO, virtual tour, banners

modules.name: Admissions CRM
modules.description: Inquiry, counseling, entrance test, document collection, admission approval, enrollment

modules.name: Student Information System
modules.description: Student profile, lifecycle, documents, health, guardians, promotion, TC, alumni

modules.name: Parent & Guardian Portal
modules.description: Child visibility, fee payments, communication, PTM, consent, approvals

modules.name: Teacher Management
modules.description: Teacher profile, timetable, classes, homework, marks, lesson plans

modules.name: Employee HRMS
modules.description: Recruitment, onboarding, attendance, leave, payroll, documents, exit

modules.name: Academic Configuration
modules.description: Boards, grades, semesters, terms, streams, sections, batches, subjects, topics

modules.name: Curriculum & Lesson Planning
modules.description: Syllabus, lesson plan, outcomes, resources, completion tracking

modules.name: Timetable & Scheduling
modules.description: Class, teacher, room, lab, substitution, availability and conflict management

modules.name: Attendance
modules.description: Student/staff attendance via manual, QR, RFID, biometric, face recognition and geofence

modules.name: Homework & Assignments
modules.description: Homework, projects, submissions, grading, rubrics, parent visibility

modules.name: Examination Management
modules.description: Exam plans, internal exams, semester exams, question bank, marks entry, grading

modules.name: Question Paper Management
modules.description: Subject-wise papers, blueprint, moderation, approval, printing, online exams

modules.name: Report Cards & Transcripts
modules.description: CBSE/IB/semester formats, GPA, remarks, promotion rules, transcripts

modules.name: Library Management
modules.description: Physical library, digital library, issue/return, reservations, fines, resource access

modules.name: Digital Learning Repository
modules.description: E-books, videos, notes, papers, recorded classes, chapter-wise content

modules.name: Fees & Billing
modules.description: Fee plans, activity charges, collection, reminders, concessions, refunds, receipts

modules.name: Finance & Accounting
modules.description: Ledger, vendors, purchase orders, budgets, expense approvals, reconciliation

modules.name: Meal & Cafeteria
modules.description: Meal plans, distribution, menu, nutrition, inventory, vendor procurement

modules.name: Transport
modules.description: Routes, vehicles, stops, GPS, drivers, fee mapping, student tracking

modules.name: Hostel
modules.description: Rooms, allocation, visitors, attendance, mess, hostel fees, discipline

modules.name: Activities & Events
modules.description: Clubs, sports, competitions, summer camps, off-campus activities, registration, charges

modules.name: PTM & Communication
modules.description: PTM slots, meeting notes, feedback, email, SMS, WhatsApp, push notifications

modules.name: Knowledge Base
modules.description: Institution policies, student handbook, teacher handbook, FAQs, AI-searchable content

modules.name: Dashboards & Analytics
modules.description: Role-based dashboards, board analytics, finance analytics, academic analytics

modules.name: AI Copilots
modules.description: Student tutor, teacher assistant, parent assistant, principal copilot, admissions bot

modules.name: Mobile Apps
modules.description: Student, parent, teacher, management and transport apps

modules.name: Security & Compliance
modules.description: RBAC, audit logs, data privacy, consent, encryption, backup, tenant isolation

modules.name: Integrations
modules.description: WhatsApp, email, SMS, payment gateway, calendar, video meetings, SSO, biometric, RFID

modules.name: Administration & Workflow
modules.description: Approvals, forms, tasks, notifications, document templates, SLA tracking
